name: The Mind Game
overview: When Dr. Tatthai woke up from surgery after a serious accident he found himself capable of knowing the thoughts of others. Just by making eye contact. Then one day he made a mistake  and being framed for a murder that he did not commit. Tathai was given the maximum penalty: death.  Only he can prove himself innocent and he will do everything possible to present the truth.

trailers.title: เมื่ออุบัติเหตุ ทำให้เขามีพลังพิเศษ | ตัวอย่าง จิตสังหาร EP.1 | 14 มิ.ย. 64 | one31
